name: gmail-mcp
description: Gmail MCP/HTTP-tool server for the email-order-import workflow. Exposes POST /tools/{search_pending,download_attachment,mark_imported,mark_ignored} (the repo's HTTP tool convention used by llm_agent mcp_servers and callable via the http_request activity). Wraps the Gmail API and uploads PDF attachments to Supabase Storage, returning a signed URL.
